## SessionBaseId type

Session identifier within a single collection (user library session storage). Format: YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS-xxxxxxxx (same as SessionId)

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type SessionBaseId = Brand<string, 'SessionBaseId'>;
```
